Lightly grease muffin tins.
Press 1 wrapper in each cup and brush with oil.
Bake 5 min until golden brown remove and place on baking sheets.
Fill with sausage mixture and bake until bubbly.

name: Corn and Pepper Orzo
directions: Cook pasta according to package directions.
Meanwhile, in a large nonstick skillet coated with cooking spray, saute red pepper and onion in oil for 2 minutes.
Add the corn, italian seasoning, salt and pepper; cook and stir until vegetables are tender.
Drain pasta; stir into the pan with vegetables.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Orzo and Spinach Sort of Romano's Macaroni Grill Style

name: Bonefish Grill's Bang Bang Shrimp Copycat Recipe
directions: Soak shrimp in bowl with milk.
In a bowl put panko bread crumbs and another bowl put corn starch.  Dredge the shrimp in the corn starch, then again in the milk and finally in the panko bread crumbs & set aside.
Heat a large skillet to 300 degrees F. Drop shrimp in and fry until golden brown. Remove from oil.  Drain fried shrimp on paper towels.
In a large bowl combine fried shrimp with sauce until evenly coated.  Pile on a bed of shredded cabbage and garnish with scallions.

similar.name: Nanny's White House Shrimp 5 Star Family Favorite

name: Curry for Beginners
directions: 1. cook rice and set aside.
2. dice chicken breast and saute in olive oil, set aside.
3. mix soup and curry paste in a sauce pan and bring to rapid boil, simmer for 10 minutes, stir frequently.
4. ad chicken breast.
5. serve over rice.

similar.name: No Yolks Noodles and Chicken Teriyaki
Thai Sweet Potato and Leek Soup

name: Raspberry & Brie Cocktail Sandwiches
directions: cut center out of bread, but do not cut out bottom. Insert brie. Spoon jam over cheese. Sprinkle on almonds. Bake at 275 until cheese is melted. Cube bread that was removed from center of loaf. Serve with cubed bread.

name: Tuna Cakes
directions: Mix all ingredients and refrigerate for 15 minutes.
Spray baking sheet with nonstick cooking spray.
Form into about 12 patties and place onto pan.
Bake at 350 for 10 minutes.

similar.name: Slammin' Salmon Crunchy Cakes With Gayla Sauce
Easy Pan-Fried Fish Fillets and Tartar Sauce

name: Gramma's Past Salad
directions: Boil pasta and cook per package directions.
Add the rest of the ingredients.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Refridgerate for about 3 hours.
Stir and serve!

name: Orange Balsamic Chicken Thighs-Rachel Ray
directions: Heat the olive oil over medium high heat.
Season the chicken with salt and pepper and add to the hot skillet.
Sprinkle the rosemary on top and cook the chicken until crispy and brown, 8 to 10 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to a platter.
Wisk the balsamic vinegar and marmelade into the skillet.
Lower the heat and simmer for 1 minute.
return the chicken to the pan and coat with the sauce.
Remove the pan from the heat and stir in the baby spinach, stirring till wilted and coated with sauce.
Sprinkle the pecans on the chicken and serve.

name: Easy Bacon Ranch Pasta Salad
directions: Combine all together with cooked pasta that has been rinsed and drained.  Chill at least 2 hours before serving. Can use Tastefully Simple Bacon Bacon as substitute for bacon bits.

name: Coconut Bark
directions: Spray an 8x8 inch baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.
Mix coconut and evaporated milk together in a bowl.
Pour into baking dish and then smooth out (make sure it is level so that it cooks evenly).
Bake at 350 for 20 minutes or until browned.
Cool completely and then cut into bars.

This is how the recipe/show said to do it, mostly. Some people have found that a package of coconut does not yield 5 1/2 cups, but the recipe works with less coconut. I found that I cooked mine for 25 minutes, cooled it, then ended up putting it back in the oven for another 10 minutes. Next time I am going to put it in a 9x13 pan, since I like the toasted coconut best. Other people found that they could drop tablespoonfuls on cookie sheets and bake them for 15 minutes or so.

similar.name: Quick and Easy Chocolate Cashew Brittle
Thai Sweet Potato and Leek Soup

name: Moroccan Chicken Chorizo Soup
directions: Pan fry chorizo until browned.  Whack all ingredients except green beans into the chicken stock and simmer until chicken is cooked.  Add green beans until soft.  Serve!

name: Stuffed Mushrooms
directions: Grease a 15x10x1 inch jelly roll pan.
Wipe mushrooms with damp towel until clean.  Pat dry.  Remove stems, trim caps and finely chop stems.
Combine chopped stems, bread crumbs and parmesan cheese.  Mound into mushroom caps.  Place into prepared pan.  Dot with butter.
Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes or until mushrooms are cooked through and lightly browned.

name: Simple Stuffed Mushrooms
directions: Clean mushrooms & remove stems. Place hollow side up on baking sheet. Fill each with 1 teaspoon of cheese & sprinkle with bread crumbs. Bake at 375@ for 12-15 minutes. Serve hot.

name: Easy White Sauce for Pasta
directions: In a large deep sauce or frying pan: Melt butter on MEDIUM LOW heat! Nice and slow! I tend to think mine will get done faster if I turn up the heat a bit and I ALWAYS burn my butter --  Learn from my mistakes! GO SLOW!

Whisk in flour til it is a smooth, slightly thickened, liquid. Typically refered to as a "rue". This may take slighly more OR LESS than 1/4 c flour. It should be completely smooth and still liquid though!
Add 1/4 c milk (more or less). WHISK! DON'T STOP WHISKING! Your liquid will become an almost immobile mass in your pan. YAY! :) Keep adding milk til you are comfortable with the texture.

Add Chicken Broth SLOWLY as with with the milk whisking the whole time. Your looking for a slightly thinner sauce than you'll want over all because the cheeses will begin to thicken it and as it cools, it gets even thicker still. Most will probably already know these steps as it's fairly common procedure but I HAD to list them for those of you who have not experienced this method. Alot of gravy's, soup's, and sauces will call for similar treatment. And who doesn't LOVE butter!? Don't answer that --  My husband doesn't! lol But he loves this recipe!
Now add your cheeses, garlic, parsley, and pepper. WHISK! lol

TASTE TEST! If your eyes don't close in a quick moment of bliss, you probably need a little more cheese or spice! :) Also: This would be when you add things like pepared diced chicken or shrimp or veggies, just continue on medium low heat til warmed through. ENJOY!

similar.name: Ravioli With Tomato Cream Sauce (Super  Easy!!)

name: Extreme Chocolate Shake
directions: In blender add ice cream, whipping cream, and milk (if needed add enough milk to make pourable).
Add chocolate syrup ( or if making vanilla milk shake add vanilla ) and add cookies.
blend until combined.

name: Shrimp Scampi a La Patrece
directions: Thaw and peel jumbo shrimp. Rinse and drain.
Melt 1/4 Smart Balance in a large wok. Mince two large cloves of garlic into hot oil. Add finely chopped rosemary and pineapple sage.
Add a squirt or two of Worchestershire sauce or Bragg's.
Cook about 2 minutes until garlic is golden.
Add shrimp and cook, turning often, for about 6 minutes until opaque. Lightly sprinkle with onion salt.
YUMMY!

similar.name: Buttery Garlic & Garden Herb Grilled Jumbo Shrimp
Easy Shrimp and Scallop in White Wine Sauce

name: Tomato Soup & Noodles
directions: Cook pasta per directions until al dente.  Drain water and add tomato soup and 3/4 soup can (1 cup) of water to pasta.  Stir in sugar and pepper and serve when hot.

name: Peanut Butter Cup Cookies
directions: 1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees c).
2. Sift together the flour, salt and baking soda; set aside.
3. Cream together the butter, sugar, peanut butter and brown sugar until fluffy. Beat in the egg, vanilla and milk. Add the flour mixture; mix well.
4. Shape into 40 balls and place each into an ungreased mini muffin pan (I use a teflon pan).
5. Bake at 375 degrees for about 8 minutes - NO LONGER!. Remove from oven and immediately press a mini peanut butter cup into each ball. Cool and carefully remove from pan.

name: Prawn (Shrimp) Cocktail With Dill Dressing
directions: For the dill dressing - combine the egg mayonnaise, mustard,m dill and water in a small bowl and season with salt and pepper to taste and set aside.
Divide lettuce, avocado and mango among serving glasses and top with prawns and dressing and sprinkle with capers and extra dill sprigs and serve.

similar.name: Tossed Shrimp and Ravioli With Lemon
Seafood Starter in a Lime, Cilantro, Sour Cream Sauce

name: Pan Fried Blackened Fish
directions: Combine all spices on a plate.
melt butter in a skillet.
coat fish with spices.
cook fillets in melted butter, about 3 min on each side.

similar.name: Easy Pan-Fried Fish Fillets and Tartar Sauce

name: Cucumber Delight!
directions: Bake the french bread according to the directions. Once baked, cut into 1 inch slices.
Mix the powdered italian dressing mix with the softened cream cheese and spread evenly over each slice of bread.
Place a slice of cucumber on top of each piece. Set a few sprigs of dill weed on top of the cucumber.

name: Radish Salad
directions: Chop the first four ingredients to your liking, and mix well.
Cut the tomatoes into quarters and add to radish mix, along with parsely.
Mix vinegar and olive oil, and pour over the top of the salad and toss. I like to let it marinate for at least an hour before serving but it's also good straight out.

name: Penne Pasta With Chicken, Grape Tomatoes, Zuchinni
directions: Heat oil over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic. Cook until translucent.
Increase heat. Add cubed chicken. Stir briskly until white.
Add zucchini and halved tomatoes, salt, chili powder, and basil.
Reduce to low-med heat, cover, and cook 10 minutes.
Cook pasta according to directions.
Mix cooked, drained, hot pasta with 2 tablespoons softened butter.
Add chicken mixture (I like to smash/break up the tomatoes before mixing with pasta) and toss.

name: Easy Maple Apple Protein Bars
directions: Preheat over to 325F and spray a baking sheet or 9x12 baking dish with non-stick spray. The 9x12 baking dish will yeild thicker bars.
Mix oats, powdered milk, and protein powder in bowl and blend well.
In separate bowl, combine eggwhites, apple juice, applesauce, and the sugar-free syrup and blend well.
Stir liquid mixture into dry ingredients until blended. The consistency will be thick and similar to cookie dough.
Spread batter onto pan and bake until edges are crisp and browned.
Cut into 10 bars and store in airtight container or freeze.

name: Ramen Poutine
directions: Crush the ramen in the package until only small pieces are left. Carefully open the package and discard the seasoning packet.
Heat the oil in a skillet until shimmering. Add the crushed ramen and cook, stirring frequently, until noodles begin to brown and get very crispy.
Transfer ramen to an oven-safe single-serving dish. Top with gravy and cheese, then broil until cheese melts. Serve with beer.

name: Cheesy Meaty Nachos for a Crowd
directions: Remove casing from the chorizo, and fry sausage until done, chopping it up into small crumbles. Mix with tomatoes and cheese sauce. Heat in crock pot and serve with chips and jalapeno pepper slices.

similar.name: Creamy Chicken and Jalapeno Nachos from Silver Palate

name: Flounder Amandine
directions: preheat oven to 350
on a baking sheet spread almonds in a single layer.  bake 7-10 minutes stirring frequently.
melt butter in a shallow baking dish in oven.
place onions in dish and top with fish.
in a small bowl mix lemon juice mayo and parsely and spread over fish.
sprinkle with cheese and bake 15-20 minutes.
top with almonds.

similar.name: Kittencal's Low Fat Baked Parmesan Fish Fillets

name: Elegant Shrimp Dip
directions: Mix first 5 ingredients until well combined.  Fold in shrimp, being careful not to tear them.  Chill overnight.

similar.name: Nanny's White House Shrimp 5 Star Family Favorite
Butterfly Shrimp With Blue Cheese Dip
Hot or Cold Onion & Clam Dip

name: Cheese Balls
directions: Sift flour, salt and cayenne pepper together.
Mix cheese with flour.
Beat egg yolk and lemon together, mix with dry ingredients.
Stiffly beat egg whites, and mix into mixture.
Heat oil in fry pan.
Drop approximately 12 portions into oil, fry until golden brown, turning to cook both sides.
Drain on paper towel.

name: Barbeque Glazed Meatballs
directions: Combine jelly and barbeque sauce in a large saucepan.
Cook and stir over medium heat until jelly melts.
Add meatballs.
Heat over medium-low heat 15 minutes, or until meatballs are hot and glazed, stirring occasionally.
Serve in slow cooker set on low, if desired.

name: Easy Crunchy Toffee
directions: Place the matzo crackers on a greased jellyroll pan, to cover the entire bottom.

Bring butter and brown sugar to a boil, boil for three minutes. Pour the mixture over the crackers. Bake in preheated 350 degree oven for 15 minutes. Remove, sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the top. Wait five minutes, then spread the melted chips over the crackers. Sprinkle toasted almonds over the  crackers, chill. Break apart, and enjoy!
You can adapt this with saltines, simply cover the pan with them. I have to say, I couldn't believe how good they were, and I'm not a  sugary treat kind of girl!

name: Seasoned Crackers
directions: Preheat oven to 200 degrees.
Whisk together oil and seasonings. Add crackers and toss to coat evenly.
Spread onto large baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes, stir and cook 10 minutes more.  Serve!

name: Chicken Crisper Salad
directions: Cook chicken tenders as directed on package, chop in slices after cooked,.
Add desired lettuce amount to your plate, top with cooked chicken tenders, tomato, cheese, egg, and Ranch dressing.

name: Dave's World Famous Deviled Eggs
directions: Hard boil eggs.
Slice in half lengthwise.
Separate yolks from whites.
Mash yolks; mix with mayonnaise and 3 dashes of Durkee's Red Hot (or similar like Texas Pete; do not use Tabasco).
Mince green onion and mix with yolk mixture.
Spoon into egg white hollows.
Sprinkle Sweet Paprika over eggs (or try smoked paprika).
Refrigerate!
Enjoy.

similar.name: Easy Pan-Fried Fish Fillets and Tartar Sauce

name: Christmas Cheese Log
directions: Mix all ingredients well, roll into log or ball and refrigerate 1 hour. The longer you let it sit the better the flavors combine, but it is still good after a hour.

name: Chocolate Covered Jellies
directions: In the top of a double boiler mix semi sweet chocolate pieces, semi sweet morsels and butter and parafin.
Place top over boiling water.
Stir chocolate mixture until melted.
Remove pan from heat, but keep over the hot water.
Using a wooden toothpick, dip the Fruit Gems into the chocolate.
Place candy on waxed paper lined cookie
Let stand until chocolate is set.

name: Garlic Scallion Noodles
directions: Cook pasta according to package directions. Drain and rinse.
In a heavy skillet over medium heat, melt butter.
Add scallions and garlic.
Stir and cook without browning the garlic.
Cook until the garlic smell is fragrant and filling the room (about 5 minutes).
Add brown sugar and soy sauce and cook for another minute.
Increase the heat a bit and throw in the noodles.
Quickly saute the noodles until they are all coated with the garlicky butter mixture.
Serve immediately.
Garnish with additional scallions if desired.

name: Mom's Famous Pretzels
directions: Preheat oven to 300 degrees.  Melt butter in microwave with garlic powder, stir to combine.  Pour pretzels into large bowl.  Pour butter mix ovver and stir well with spatula.  Sprinkle parmesan over pretzels and stir to coat.  Distribute pretzels onto a large jelly roll pan and bake 5 minutes, flip pretzels over and bake another 5 minutes.  Cool and wait for the ooos and ahhs!

name: Fresh Strawberry Jam
directions: In a saucepan, mix the ingredients well. Make sure there are no lumps of starch in the strawberry juice.
Turn stove on to medium heat. Stir continuesly while heating, uncovered.
After about 7-12 mins, of heating and stirring, the jam mixture should be thick.
Turn the heat of and transfer to small bowl; either leave it outside to cool, uncovered, or place a plastic wrap directly on the surface on jam and refrigerate.

name: Easy Pecan Crusted Salmon
directions: Place first four ingredients in a food processor and pulse until pecans are finely chopped.  Pour out onto a plate.
Coat salmon fillets on both sides with olive oil.  Press filets into pecans until all pecans are used.
Heat small amount of olive oil in a large skillet.  Cook salmon about 5 minutes on each side until pecans are lightly brown and salmon is tender.

name: Broccoli Slaw ( Low Fat Version )
directions: Whisk milk, mayo, sour cream, agave syrup, vinegar, lemon, deli mustard, celery seed, pepper and onion flakes until creamy.
Chop walnuts & cranberries.
Peel and cut Granny Smith apple in strips to resemble the slaw mix.
Incorporate all ingredients in a bowl until veggies, nuts and fruit are covered with the slaw dressing.

similar.name: Creamed Spinach or Broccoli or Chard - Low Carb

name: Quick Throw-Together
directions: Boil water and cook pasta until tender.  While pasta is cooking, slice ham and salami into bite-sized chunks, and then do the same with cheese.
When pasta is finished, run cold water over it to cool immediately.
Put the pasta in a large container, and add meats, cheese, artichoke hearts and olives.
Pour entire bottle of dressing on the pasta and mix thoroughly.
Refrigerate.

similar.name: Orzo and Spinach Sort of Romano's Macaroni Grill Style

name: Kielbasa & Summer Bean Salad
directions: Combine the beans, peppers, onion, vinegar, 1 tbsp oil, salt, pepper, and cilantro in a large bowl.
Heat the remaining 1 tbsp oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.  Add the kielbasa and cook until slightly browned, 2 to 3 minutes per side.
Toss kielbasa with the bean salad and serve.

similar.name: Sweet Sausage and Bean Salad - It's a Meal in Itself!

name: Maple Flax Granola
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Combine syrup, brown sugar and oil in large microwaveable bowl.
Cook at high power for 3 minutes.
In another large bowl, combine oats, coconut, peanuts, chocolate chips, raisins and flax seed.
Pour hot syrup mixture over oat mixture and stir well to combine.
Spread granola mix out into two jellyroll pans.
Bake 10 minutes then remove from oven and stir mixture.
Return to oven and bake another 10 to 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Cool to room temperature.
Break apart into chunks and stoe in sealed container.

name: Whole-Wheat Couscous With Parmesan & Peas
directions: Combine broth, water and oil in a large saucepan; bring to a boil. Stir in couscous and remove from heat. Cover and let plump for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook peas on the stovetop or in the microwave according to package directions.
Add the peas, dill, lemon zest, salt and pepper to the couscous; mix gently and fluff with a fork. Serve hot, sprinkled with cheese.

similar.name: No Yolks Noodles and Chicken Teriyaki
Creamed Spinach or Broccoli or Chard - Low Carb

name: Tuna Macaroni Salad - Protein Packed
directions: Mix all ingredients together and eat right away or let sit in the refrigerator for a few hours for the flavors to really come together.
After it's been refrigerated, if it's a bit dry, just add a bit more mayonnaise.

name: Salad Greens With Mango-Basil Vinaigrette
directions: For mango-basil vinaigrette: Place 1/2 cup of the mango in a food processor or blender. Cover and process or blend until smooth. Add salad dressing, basil, mint, and crushed red pepper; cover and process or blend just until mixed. Let stand for 5 minutes for flavors to develop.

Divide greens evenly among six salad plates. Top greens with the remaining mango, breaking mango into bite-size pieces. Drizzle each plate with 2 tablespoons of the mango-basil vinaigrette. Top with cheese. Serve immediately.

similar.name: Chicken Salad With Blue Cheese and Grapes

name: Broiled Fish With Lemon Butter
directions: Arrange lemon slices in a small roasting pan and drizzle with olive oil.  Broil 8" from the heat until lightly browned.  Mix together melted butter and lemon juice.

Scatter thyme sprigs on top of browned lemons; top with fish fillets.  Drizzle with butter/lemon juice mixture.  Broil fish 4" from the heat for 10 to 12 minutes, or just until fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
Refrigerate leftovers.

name: Pistachio Chocolate Pretzels
directions: In a small saucepan, heat chocolate over low heat until melted and smooth, stirring frequently. Spread pistachio nuts on a sheet of waxed paper.

Dip each pretzel into melted chocolate, covering about two-thirds of the pretzel. Let excess chocolate drip off. Roll dipped pretzels in pistachios to coat. Press a few cherry pieces into the chocolate on each pretzel. Place pretzels on a clean sheet of waxed paper; let stand until chocolate is set.
Storage: Layer pretzels between waxed paper in an airtight container. Cover; seal. Store at room temperature for up to 1 week or freeze for up to 3 months.

name: Easy Spanish Rice
directions: Heat 1tbsp of oil in a medium sauce pan over medium to medium high heat.  In a separate bowl, whisk together the chicken broth and tomato sauce until fully incorporated. Add rice to the heated oil and stir frequently until it begins to turn a golden brown color.  Add broth/tomato mixture to the pan all at once add garlic salt and pepper and stir.  Continue cooking until liquid starts to boil then reduce heat to low and cover.  Simmer for 20 minute  Remove from heat still covered and let steam for an extra 5 minutes.  Fluff with fork sprinkle cheese and green onions over the top if desired, recover until melted and serve.

name: Eggless Short Bread Cookies
directions: Cream sugar and Butter, add Vanilla.
Mix dry ingredients together, then add to creamed mixture.
The batter is quite dry due to lack of liquid so you have to kneed it a bit to mix and shape your cookies, try not to over kneed.
Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minute.
So easy , so delicious !

name: Rotel Cups
directions: Preheat oven to 350. Mix the first 4 ingredients and scoop evenly into the cups. Place on baking sheet and cook at 350 for 15 minutes.
**can add cooked cut up shrimp, scallops or pepperoni, hot ham, chicken, sausage.
makes: 45 cups.

name: No-Stress Herbed Cheese Focaccia
directions: Unroll dough on a greased baking sheet.  Press with fingers to form indentations; set aside.  Saute onion and garlic in oil in a skillet; remove from heat.  Stir in herbs; spread mixture evenly over dough.  Sprinkle with cheese.  Bake at 400°F for 10 to 15 minutes until golden.

similar.name: Fusilli Alla Caprese by Giada De Laurentiis

name: Egg Chop
directions: •	Mash the potatoes with chopped green chilies and coriander leaves, onion slices, black pepper powder, ghee, ginger-garlic paste and salt. Squeeze the lemon and mix well.
•	On a separate bowl, beat the egg with powdered milk, flour, salt and a pinch of black pepper powder. Set aside.

•	Make a medium sized ball out the potato mash in our palm. Press on the center of the ball with your fingers to make a small indentation. Fill in the indentation with the cubed hard boiled eggs. Cover the filling with a little more of the potato mash to make a fine ball. Now press again slightly to make it into an oval shaped “chop”.
•	Repeat this step to make around 8 chops. Set aside on a tray. Then pour the biscuit crumbs on a flat tray. Mix in a bit of oregano and Nigel seeds (black cumin).
•	Dip each chop in the beaten egg-milk mixture.

•	Place it on the tray with the biscuit crumbs. Cover it well with the crumbs. Do make sure that the crumbs are not powdery, but rather crunchy. Use one hand to dip the chop in the egg mixture, and the other hand to cover the chop with the biscuit crumbs. This way the chop will have less of a chance to break off. Repeat for the rest of the chops.

•	Heat a deep frying oil with just enough oil to fry 3-4 chops. Add one chop to the oil and dip the next chop in the egg mixture and cover with biscuit crumbs. Add this second chop to the hot oil. Repeat this process to add 3-4 chops, one by one to the oil.

•	Fry the chops until they turn brown. Filter the oil used to fry the chops on a sieve so that fried biscuit crumbs that may have broken off during the frying process are separated. Collect the fresh oil and use it again to fry the next batch of chops.
•	Add more oil if needed.
•	Place the fried chops on a paper towel so that the excess oil is soaked out.
•	Serve!

name: Buffalo Pierogies
directions: Preheat oven to 400ºF.

Combine oil, hot sauce and chili powder; toss with the pierogies. Coat a baking sheet with non-stick cooking spray and spread pierogies evenly on the baking sheet. Bake at 400ºF for 16 to 18 minutes or until pierogies are puffed and browned. For best results turn over once, halfway through bake time.
Serve with blue cheese dressing, carrots and celery.
Optional: Deep fry pierogies in 350ºF oil for 3 minutes or until golden brown, as directed on box.

name: Warm Tilapia Ceviche
directions: Boil water and dissolve bouillon cube.  Add can of tomatoes with habaneros, lime juice, spinach.  Cook until fish is done.  Add cilantro to taste.

similar.name: Tilapia With Mayonnaise and Parmesan Cheese
Seafood Starter in a Lime, Cilantro, Sour Cream Sauce
Easy Pan-Fried Fish Fillets and Tartar Sauce

name: Lettuce Soup
directions: Melt butter in large saucepan.
Add onion and sauté until soft and clear.
Mix in flour, salt and pepper.
Stir in chicken stock until it boils and thickens slightly.
Add lettuce. Simmer for about 3 minutes.
Add creamy milk. Heat through.

One thing I do different then the original recipe is I like to blend the soup just before serving with a hand blender until I get the consistency I like. CAREFUL when doing this because it is very hot!

name: Low Carb Hamburger Gravy
directions: Brown the hamburger over medium high, until there is no pink remaining and then add the celery and mushrooms, stirring and continuing to cook for 2 more minutes. Stir in the flour and let it simmer on low for a couple of minutes, allowing the flour to turn a light golden brown.

Add the soup mix and beef broth to the ground beef mixture. Stirring continually as it thickens. Once it has thickened remove from heat and add the sour cream, stirring until the sour cream is well blended and the mixture re-thickens.
Serve over cooked (slightly mashed cauliflower or low carb noodles) or, if you are not counting carbs over rice or mashed potatoes.

name: Henry Baines Sauce
directions: Mix and bottle. I use Ball jars to bottle the sauce. You can store unrefrigerated. Once opened, refrigerate. Note: The serving size is 8-50 because it really depends on how you serve it. If you serve as an appetizer on top of cheese and crackers, you can easily serve 50 people. If you marinate meat in it as an entree, it will probably serve approximately 8 people.

similar.name: Easy Pan-Fried Fish Fillets and Tartar Sauce

name: Southwestern Chicken and Hashbrowns
directions: Fry potatoes as directed on package.
Fry chicken just enough to heat it.
Place chicken on top of hash browns.
Sprinkle on cheddar cheese.
Dollop sour cram on top.
Enjoy.

similar.name: No Yolks Noodles and Chicken Teriyaki

name: Cabbage-Free Protein-Packed Cole Slaw
directions: Mix all ingredients.
Serve chilled.

similar.name: No Yolks Noodles and Chicken Teriyaki

name: Green Bean Casserole
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
Melt butter in large skillet.
Saute the onions and Mushrooms in the butter.
Boil green beans in chicken broth for 10 minutes and drain.
Add green beans, mushrooms soup, onion rings, and House seasoning, to taste, to the onion mixture.
Stir well.
Pour into a greased baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
Top Casserole with cheddar and bake for 10 minutes longer or until casserole is hot and cheese is melted.

name: Fried Rice
directions: On medium high heat, heat the oil in a large skillet or wok.
Add the peas/carrots mix, onion and garlic.
Stir fry until tender.
Lower the heat to medium low and push the mixture off to one side of skillet or wok.
Pour your eggs on the other side of skillet and stir fry until scrambled.
Add the rice and soy sauce and blend all together well.
Stir fry until thoroughly heated.
Serve and enjoy!

similar.name: No Yolks Noodles and Chicken Teriyaki
Easy Pan-Fried Fish Fillets and Tartar Sauce

name: Cannabis Infused Butter
directions: Combine cannabis and butter and simmer over low heat for 20 minutes.
Strain out the cannabis and use in recipes which require butter.

name: Kale Chips À La Burdowman
directions: Preheat the oven to 350º.  Tear the leaves from the stems and break them into bite size pieces.  Wash them well, spin dry, then place on a cookie sheet.

Drizzle the Kale pieces with the best quality olive oil you can find (this really does make a difference), sprinkle sea salt on top.  Rub the salt and oil into the Kale and then place in the preheated oven for 10 minutes.  Check at 8 or 9 minutes to prevent over cooking.
If more is needed just double the recipe.  These keep for a good while in an airtight container.

name: Quick and Easy Hot Dogs With Mashed Potatos
directions: Prepare mashed potatoes according to package directions, set aside.
Split hot dogs lengthwise, spread open on cookie sheet (moist inner portion should be facing up).
Sprinkle ground mustard on hot dogs.
Stir cheese and garlic into mashed potatoes; spoon into split.
Sprinkle paprika over the top.
Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes; until hot.

name: Teriyaki Salmon Portions
directions: Marinade the salmon in the teriyaki, sesame oil, ginger and pepper for an hour or so.

Place the chopped leeks on some foil, adding the salmon on top.  roll the prawns in  the sweet chilli sauce - place them on top of the salmon and pour the remaining chilli sauce over the top.   Seal the parcels up gently and not too tight.
Place in the oven at 180c for approx 15 minutes.
Serve with stuffed or jacket potatoes salads and crusty bread.

similar.name: Grilled Salmon With Peanut Hoisin Sauce

name: Croutons
directions: Preheat oven to 350.
Heat olive oil and garlic halves for five minutes. Let cool and remove garlic.
In large bowl, toss cubed bread with olive oil and seasonings.
Lay in a single layer on baking sheet.
Bake for 15 minutes or until crunchy.

name: Cream of Corn
directions: Add the corn with 1/2 of the brine tothe pot and set to low. Add the condiment of choice.
Add the salt and blend. Sprinkle with chili chipotle and enjoy.

name: Percy Jackson Blue Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Mix butter and sugar.
Add egg and vanilla to mixture (you can use an electrical mixer for this).
Add flour, salt and chocolate chips (if there is a lot of flour left over, use your hands to mix it in.) If the dough is too wet add a bit more flour.
Add the blue food colouring.
Mold the dough into little balls and place evenly on a UNGREASED cookie sheet (far enough so they don't bake together).
Put them in the oven for 8-12 minutes.
When finished baking, put them on a cooling rack and enjoy!

name: Potato & Chorizo Breakfast Hash
directions: Preheat the oven to 180ºC/gas 4.
Peel and finely chop the onion and garlic, chop the chorizo, dice up the cooked potato and pick and finely chop the parsley.
Gently fry the onion and garlic in a little oil in an ovenproof pan until the onion is soft. Add the chorizo and fry for 2 to 3 minutes.
Add the potatoes and cook for 5 minutes more, then crack the eggs on top.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake for 8 minutes, or until the egg white is set but the yolk is still runny.
Sprinkle with sea salt, black pepper and the parsley, to serve.

name: Opor Ayam Tahu from Indonesia
directions: Cut the chicken boxes and then boil them first until they come out (approx. 10-15 minutes) turn off then set aside.
Puree the onion, garlic, coriander, candlenut, nutmeg, cloves, turmeric. Galangal geprek, tie lemongrass. Set aside.

Heat the pan, pour a little oil. Saute the spices until they smell good. Pour chicken broth into the pan little by little while stirring. Then enter galangal geprek, lemongrass, cinnamon bark, bay leaves and orange leaves.
Add the chicken first. Boil again while correcting the taste with salt, pepper, sugar and powdered chicken broth. Then enter the know. Can add a little more water. Stir slowly.
When it is tofu and chicken is cooked. Taste is also right. Pour coconut milk. Stir and boil for a while, don't let the coconut milk break. Lift. Complete with a sprinkling of fried onions.

similar.name: No Yolks Noodles and Chicken Teriyaki

name: Heidi's Sugar Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Combine all ingredients.
Roll out dough on floured surface and cut into shapes.
Place cookies on greased cookie sheet.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown.

name: Instant Pot Chili
directions: Set Instant Pot to Sauté function and add oil. Add onion and cook until soft, 5 minutes. Stir in garlic and cook until fragrant, 1 minute, then add tomato paste, stirring to combine. Add ground beef and cook, breaking meat up with a wooden spoon, until no longer pink, 7 minutes. Drain fat, if necessary.
Return insert to Instant Pot and add broth, beans, tomatoes, chili powder, cumin, oregano and cayenne. Season with salt and pepper. Lock lid and set to Pressure Cook on High for 14 minutes.
Follow manufacturer’s instructions to quick release, then remove lid. Serve with desired toppings.
